channel.title: Declassification on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Declassification on Alien Truth Social

item.title: CEFORA: Argentinean UFO Phenomenon Studies Committee
item.description:
CEFORA, the Argentinean Republic Committee for UFO Phenomena Studies, is an organization formed by various ufology groups in Argentina. Its primary objective is the declassification of all UFO-related phenomena in Argentina. CEFORA has formally requested information from the National Ministry of Defense, the National Presidency, and the Chamber of Deputies. Silvia Pérez Simondini serves as the director of CEFORA and also runs the Visión OVNI UFO Museum in Victoria, Entre Ríos.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cefora
